languages.text: "Сеча днями напролет! Славные времена впереди, брат!" {n}Ульфар кровожадно улыбается.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Сеча днями напролет! Славные времена впереди, брат!" {n}Ульфар кровожадно улыбается.{/n}
traits.speaker: UlfarCompanion

languages.text: "Battling day after day! Glorious times await, brother!" {n}Ulfar gives a bloodthirsty grin.{/n}

"Battling day after day! Glorious times await, brother!" {n}Ulfar gives a bloodthirsty grin.{/n}

languages.text: “日复一日地战斗！光荣的岁月即将来临，兄弟！”{n}乌尔法露出嗜血的狞笑。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Battling day after day! Glorious times await, brother!" {n}Ulfar gives a bloodthirsty grin.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “日复一日地战斗！光荣的岁月即将来临，兄弟！”{n}乌尔法露出嗜血的狞笑。{/n}

languages.text: «¡Batallas día tras día! ¡Te esperan tiempos gloriosos, hermano!». {n}Ulfar sonríe con sed de sangre.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Battling day after day! Glorious times await, brother!" {n}Ulfar gives a bloodthirsty grin.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «¡Batallas día tras día! ¡Te esperan tiempos gloriosos, hermano!». {n}Ulfar sonríe con sed de sangre.{/n}

languages.text: « Des batailles chaque jour ! Des heures glorieuses nous attendent, mon frère ! » {n}Le rictus d'Ulfar reflète sa soif de sang.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Battling day after day! Glorious times await, brother!" {n}Ulfar gives a bloodthirsty grin.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Des batailles chaque jour ! Des heures glorieuses nous attendent, mon frère ! » {n}Le rictus d'Ulfar reflète sa soif de sang.{/n}

languages.text: "Günbegün savaşmak! Bizi şanlı zamanlar bekliyor kardeşim!" {n}Ulfar, kana susamış bir gülümseme takınıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Battling day after day! Glorious times await, brother!" {n}Ulfar gives a bloodthirsty grin.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Günbegün savaşmak! Bizi şanlı zamanlar bekliyor kardeşim!" {n}Ulfar, kana susamış bir gülümseme takınıyor.{/n}

languages.text: "Wir kämpfen Tag um Tag. Ruhmreiche Zeiten erwarten uns, Bruder!" {n}Ulfar grinst dich blutrünstig an.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Battling day after day! Glorious times await, brother!" {n}Ulfar gives a bloodthirsty grin.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Wir kämpfen Tag um Tag. Ruhmreiche Zeiten erwarten uns, Bruder!" {n}Ulfar grinst dich blutrünstig an.{/n}

languages.text: 「毎日戦っている！栄光ある時代が待っているぞ、兄貴！」{n}ウルファは血に飢えたような笑みを浮かべる.{/n}
